gist.headline: Forging new stories
gist.blurb: StoryForge just landed in the app showcase. It turns your stray ideas into chapter-based short stories, complete with AI cover art.
gist.summary: Added StoryForge to the community showcase, a client-side web app that generates illustrated short stories using the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Creators can now discover StoryForge in the writing section to easily generate and illustrate their own chapter-based tales.
gist.visual_concept: StoryForge implies crafting tales. Polly the bee acting as an author or blacksmith of words. A cozy writing desk with magical books, a tiny anvil, and glowing pages.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, sitting at a wooden desk reading a glowing magical book. A small pixelated anvil sits on the desk next to a lime green (#ecf874) inkwell. Soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
